languages.text: "Ксеносы — в частности, эльдары — любят прятать за подобными технологиями свои темные делишки, шерин. Может, взглянем на них одним глазком?"

traits.locale_text: "Ксеносы — в частности, эльдары — любят прятать за подобными технологиями свои темные делишки, шерин. Может, взглянем на них одним глазком?"
traits.speaker: JaeCompanion

languages.text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"
languages.original_text: "Ксеносы — в частности, эльдары — любят прятать за подобными технологиями свои темные делишки, шерин. Может, взглянем на них одним глазком?"

traits.locale_text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"
"Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"
"Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"

languages.text: “异形——尤其是艾达灵族——就喜欢用这种技术掩盖他们见不得光的勾当，亲爱的。我们何不去瞧上一眼？”
languages.original_text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"

traits.locale_text: “异形——尤其是艾达灵族——就喜欢用这种技术掩盖他们见不得光的勾当，亲爱的。我们何不去瞧上一眼？”

languages.text: «A los xenos, especialmente a los Aeldari, les gusta ocultar sus actos oscuros tras esta tecnología, shereen. ¿Por qué no echamos un vistazo?».
languages.original_text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"

traits.locale_text: «A los xenos, especialmente a los Aeldari, les gusta ocultar sus actos oscuros tras esta tecnología, shereen. ¿Por qué no echamos un vistazo?».

languages.text: « Les xénos, et les Aeldari en particulier, aiment dissimuler leurs sombres machinations à l'aide de telles technologies, shereen. Pourquoi ne pas y jeter un coup d'œil ? »
languages.original_text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"

traits.locale_text: « Les xénos, et les Aeldari en particulier, aiment dissimuler leurs sombres machinations à l'aide de telles technologies, shereen. Pourquoi ne pas y jeter un coup d'œil ? »

languages.text: "Zenolar özellikle de Aeldariler; karanlık işlerini böyle teknolojilerin arkasına saklamayı severler şirinim. Neden onlara bir göz atmıyoruz?"
languages.original_text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"

traits.locale_text: "Zenolar özellikle de Aeldariler; karanlık işlerini böyle teknolojilerin arkasına saklamayı severler şirinim. Neden onlara bir göz atmıyoruz?"

languages.text: "Xenos — insbesondere Aeldari — verbergen ihre Untaten gerne hinter solchen Technologien, Shereen. Warum seht Ihr sie Euch nicht an?"
languages.original_text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"

traits.locale_text: "Xenos — insbesondere Aeldari — verbergen ihre Untaten gerne hinter solchen Technologien, Shereen. Warum seht Ihr sie Euch nicht an?"

languages.text: 「異種族、特にアエルダーは、このような技術の陰に、彼らの暗い行いを隠すことを好む。シェリーン、彼らをのぞいてみるのはどうだろう？」
languages.original_text: "Xenos — Aeldari in particular — like to hide their dark deeds behind such technology, shereen. Why don't we take a peek at them?"

traits.locale_text: 「異種族、特にアエルダーは、このような技術の陰に、彼らの暗い行いを隠すことを好む。シェリーン、彼らをのぞいてみるのはどうだろう？」
